title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 12 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 12 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 12 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.64% today, the main contract closed at 837. The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 919-920 yuan/mt.
